description: Verify baseline environment: build and test pass before making changes
steps: Run cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF && cmake --build build and confirm it succeeds
Run cd build && ctest --output-on-failure and confirm all tests pass
Report the results in the feature file
findings: All 4 confirmed bugs fixed and 3 design-intent documentation additions made. Build passes, all 257 tests pass. RuleEngine::evaluatePacket now returns EvalResult struct with both action and matchedRuleId. IntrusionDetector caps alerts at 10000 with oldest-first eviction. pruneOldEntries called from evaluate and detectPortScan. BandwidthMonitor::checkRateLimit is no longer const.
